steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a choice that makes a generalization about symbols on flags and then supports that generalization with evidence from the notes.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: Makes a generalization but does not support it — it only defines vexillology rather than providing evidence about flag symbols. ✗
  • Choice B: Gives a specific detail about one flag but never states a broader generalization. ✗
  • Choice C: Addresses studying flags rather than symbols on flags, so it does not meet the question's requirement. ✗
  • Choice D — 'flags of some countries include symbols of animals / Kazakhstan's includes an eagle': States a clear generalization about animal symbols on flags, then directly supports it with a concrete example from the notes. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
